title: limonium × sennenii
intro: Limonium × sennenii, also known as Sennen's Sea Lavender or Sennen's Sea Pink, is a hybrid ornamental plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family, bred from the cross between Limonium binervve and Limonium compactum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium × sennenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Limonium × sennenii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat minor skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
